meta.indexTitle: Clokki – Time tracking for German teams
meta.indexDescription: Time tracking, overtime and holidays. GDPR-compliant and built for German labor law. Made in Germany.
meta.soonDescription: Clokki launches soon. Join the waitlist and be there from day one.
meta.pricingDescription: Transparent pricing for German teams – no setup fee, no minimum term. Final numbers at launch.

hero.title: Time tracking teams actually use.
hero.subtitle: Overtime, holidays and sick leave – GDPR-compliant and built for German labor law.

features.title: Everything that matters
features.subtitle: Six features that replace your spreadsheet.

time.title: Time tracking
time.description: Start, end and breaks per day. Fix past entries through a request workflow with approvals.

overtime.title: Overtime
overtime.description: Automatic calculation with deficit logic. Weekend hours cover weekly shortfalls before counting as overtime.

holidays.title: Holiday management
holidays.description: Request time off, see your balance. Convert overtime into holiday days.

sick.title: Sick leave
sick.description: Personal and family sick days – counted as worked hours under §3 EFZG (German labor law).

notifications.title: Real-time notifications
notifications.description: Approvals, alerts and status changes appear instantly in the bell icon.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.description: Team overview, CSV/Excel export and flexible contract changes – all in one place.

howItWorks.title: Set up in three steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From first click to first time entry in under five minutes.

steps.title: Create your team
steps.description: Set up an account, pick your German state – public holidays and compliance are configured automatically.

steps.title: Invite members
steps.description: Share a team ID or invite by email. Roles for employees and admins.

steps.title: Get going
steps.description: Log hours, submit requests, manage approvals – all in one place.

compliance.title: Compliant with German labor law
compliance.subtitle: Built for the requirements of German companies – without legal pitfalls.
points: All 16 German states and their public holidays
Flexible contracts: part-time, 4-day weeks, variable hours
GDPR-compliant data storage in the EU

finalCta.title: Ready to say goodbye to spreadsheets?
finalCta.subtitle: Clokki launches soon. Grab one of the early spots and we'll notify you at launch.

pricing.title: Simple pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Transparent, no setup fee, no minimum term. Final numbers will be announced at launch.

tier.name: Clokki
tier.tagline: Everything your team needs to retire its spreadsheets.
features: Time tracking with breaks & multiple blocks per day
Overtime account with deficit logic & weekly balancing
Holidays, sick days & family sick days
All 16 German states – public holidays automatic
Scheduled contract changes with impact preview

planned.heading: On the roadmap
planned.subtitle: Features we're working on. Not yet part of Clokki – landing in the coming months.

items.title: Custom branding
items.description: Upload your logo and colors so Clokki matches your company.

items.title: Simple HR file
items.description: Securely store contracts and other documents per employee.

items.title: Audit log
items.description: Full change history with before/after values for compliance-sensitive teams.

items.title: DATEV export
items.description: Timesheets exported in DATEV format for German payroll workflows.

items.title: Webhooks
items.description: Push events like holiday approvals or compliance alerts live into your own systems.

items.q: When will actual prices be available?
items.a: We'll announce pricing at the official launch. Waitlist members see numbers first and get the early-adopter discount.
Yes. After launch, every team can try Clokki free of charge – no credit card, no commitment.
Yes. No minimum term, monthly billing, cancel effective at the end of the month.
In the European Union, on EU servers – GDPR-compliant. No transfer to third countries.

footer.tagline: Time tracking for German teams. Simple, compliant, transparent.

soon.title: We're putting on the finishing touches.
soon.subtitle: Clokki launches in the next few weeks. Drop us a line – we'll get in touch the moment you can get started. No newsletter, no marketing.
soon.mailtoBody:
Hi Clokki team,

I'd like to join the waitlist.

soon.fineprint: Opens your email client. We only store your address to notify you at launch.
